title: Savory Crunchy Light Malaysian Pork Back Ribs Stir-fry
description: A savory and crunchy dish featuring pork back ribs in a light, protein-rich sauce that can be enjoyed as an appetizer or side dish.

ingredients.name: Pork Back Ribs
ingredients.notes: Trimmed and cut into bite-sized pieces.

instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and stir-fry for about 30 seconds, until fragrant but not browned.
Place pork back ribs into the wok and cook until they are lightly golden, about 5 minutes.
Pour in lime juice, kicap manis (vegetable soy sauce), water, and sugar. Stir well to combine.
Sprinkle sesame seeds over the top of the mixture for a nice crunch and texture.
In a small bowl, mix cornstarch or rice flour with water until smooth.
Pour the cornstarch-water mixture into the wok slowly while stirring continuously to thicken the sauce.
Simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes until the sauce thickens enough to coat the back ribs evenly.
Serve hot and garnish with extra sesame seeds if desired.
